content.en:
"Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor, how did the Cosmos Tower come about?"

Ye Tian asked.

The Dragon's Tooth Heavenly Ancestor said, "A long time ago, the Cosmos Tower floated down from the crack in the territorial waters. At that time, it caused quite a stir. At that time, I was not a Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor, just an ordinary Body Fusion Realm Heavenly Ancestor. Many Heavenly Ancestors tried to capture the Cosmos Tower, but unfortunately they all failed. After that, the Huanyu Tower stood somewhere in the territorial waters of Wanlong. After that, some Cosmos Orders appeared, allowing the Great Ancestors or Heavenly Ancestors to break into the Cosmos Tower. Until one day, some great ancestors united and built the Universal Alliance, which is what it is now. "

"The Universal Tower is really from the boundary gap of the territorial waters!"

Ye Tian had this guess for a long time, and now that he got the reply from the Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor, he completely understood.

If the Huanyu Tower is from the territory of Wanlong's territorial waters, it is absolutely impossible to have such a terrifying ability, and it can only come from the cracks in the territorial waters.

"In this way, that true Universal Order is only useful in the seams of territorial waters!"

He didn't intend to immediately bring the true Cosmos Order into the territorial waters, and if it fell, it would be lost.

Therefore, he plans to find clues about the Huanyu Tower in the territorial sea boundary crack, and after thoroughly understanding the role of the Huanyu Order, he will bring the Huanyu Order into the territorial sea boundary rift.

Ye Tian didn't stay with the Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor for too long, and left Falcon Dragon City.

......

Ye Tian put aside the matter of the True Huanyu Order for the time being, after all, it was useless in a short period of time.

Next, his target was the Second Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor.

Territorial sea boundary seam.

In a certain fragment not too far from the Vajra Snake Clan, after Ye Tian stabilized the Blood Transformation Realm once, he swallowed some Golden Muscle Fluid in one gulp and began to cultivate.

The cultivation method of the primary blood transformation is the same as the cultivation method of the secondary blood transformation, which is to continue to temper the heart and let the heart metamorphose again, thus causing the secondary blood transformation of immeasurable blood.

However, after Ye Tian refined the golden muscle fluid this time, he found that the golden muscle fluid could no longer continue to refine the heart.

"Sure enough, it's useless!"

Ye Tian muttered.

The Golden Muscle Fluid is just a basic substance in the Vajra Snake Clan, so it is already very good to be able to help him complete a blood change, but it is impossible to help him perform another blood change.

But even so, the value of gold muscle fluid is unimaginable.

"Golden Muscle Fluid is useless to me, but it is useful to the Terrans. I can collect enough Golden Muscle Fluid, and if the Human Race cultivates to the peak of the Body Fusion Realm in the future, I can use the Golden Muscle Fluid to impact the Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor Realm. "

Therefore, Ye Tian was going to collect some more golden muscle fluid in the territory of the King Kong Snake.

And just like that, the long years passed.

Ye Tian only transported a small amount of the golden muscle fluid at a time, and the value of the golden muscle fluid in the Vajra Snake was not too great, so his behavior did not arouse the suspicion of the Vajra Snake clan.

Gradually, he had collected a large amount of gold muscle fluid.

"Almost, the amount of golden muscle fluid of the Vajra Snake Clan has decreased a lot recently, and it is about to affect the foundation of the Vajra Snake Clan, and if you continue to collect it, the Vajra Snake Clan will definitely investigate. "

As a result, Ye Tian temporarily gave up collecting the golden muscle fluid.

He was going to return to Wanlong's territorial waters with these golden muscle fluids first.

If it had been, he really wouldn't have been able to cross the shock stream and return.

But now it is different, his strength has been greatly improved, coupled with the continuous study of the shock flow, it seems that he can shuttle against the current in the shock flow, but the speed will be much slower than the downstream.

"Copy a few more replica bodies, and let the other replica bodies open the way in front, so that if you encounter danger, sacrifice a replica body, and the replica body with the golden muscle fluid can escape in time. "

Ye Tian did this to ensure that the golden muscle fluid would not be lost, otherwise if it was lost, the loss would be too great.

Soon.

He made three replica bodies, one of which opened the way in front and one of which kept shuttling around, so that he could be safe.

In this way, Ye Tian's three replica bodies embarked on the journey back to Wanlong's territorial waters.

Time flies, and in the beginning of the journey, Ye Tian did not encounter any trouble.

But on this day, trouble still came.

In the midst of the shock flow, Ye Tian sensed a blood transformation realm creature fleeing in a hurry in front of him.

"Four-time Blood Transformation Realm Creature - Holy Golden Ant!"

The Blood Mutant creature was fast, shuttling through the shock stream at breakneck speed.

It saw Ye Tian, but did not attack Ye Tian, but left directly, without even changing the direction in the slightest.

"Strange, why does this holy golden ant seem to be running for its life?"

Ye Tian wondered.

But soon, he understood why.

Bang!!!!!

Distance.

Shadows took up an area, advancing at breakneck speed.

"Blood Transformation Realm!"

"Blood Transformation Realm!"

"It's still a blood change realm!"

This dense black shadow is a blood transformation realm creature, but it is still the same race.

Moreover, he also saw an extremely amazing scene.

An incomparably huge Blood Transformation Realm creature carried a huge fragment on its back, and there were some Blood Transformation Realm creatures in the fragment.

"Ancient Golden Turtle!"

That's the name of this group of Blood Mutant creatures.

And the primeval golden turtle that carried the huge fragments, its aura was extremely terrifying, and it had definitely reached the Seven Blood Transformation Realm, because the essence of its aura was equivalent to the arm in the Dark Sea Fragments, but it was much thicker than the breath of the arm.

Because this is a living seventh-time Blood Transformation Realm creature.

"It's the primeval golden turtle clan on the move!"

Ye Tian guessed.

This Ancient Golden Turtle Clan is too powerful, not only has seven blood transformation realms, but also several six blood transformation realms, and there are also some five blood transformation realms, and the number of those one-time blood transformations and two blood transformations is even more.

With such a scale, even the Vajra Snake clan can't compare!

And a race of this scale actually migrated in the cracks of the territorial waters, and even the fragments of the ancestral land were carried away, I don't know what happened to it.

Airplanes!

The gaze of the Seven Blood Transformation Realm Ancient Golden Turtle stared at Ye Tian and instantly froze him.

The next moment.

An ancient golden turtle with five blood transformation realms came over, and a turtle foot stepped out of the void, and with one foot, it trampled Ye Tian's replica body away.

Replica Body Fall!

......

"Nima, it's no wonder that the Holy Golden Ant of the four Blood Transformation Realms escaped, and encountered the migration of the Ancient Golden Turtle Clan, even if it was five Blood Transformation Realms and six Blood Transformation Realms, they had to escape!"

Ye Tian suddenly realized.

The primeval beetles migrated obviously not wanting to reveal their location, so all the creatures they encountered along the way would be destroyed by them.

It can only be said that whoever encounters the primeval golden turtle clan will be unlucky.

He even suspected that the holy golden ant might not be able to escape, and might soon be caught up and killed.
